items.name: Starfield Card Back
items.description: Deep navy card back with scattered white starfield. Quiet default for newcomers.
items.flavor_text: Every duel starts in the same sky. This is what it looks like in hand.
items.art_prompt_hints: card back graphic, deep navy with scattered white starfield, centered silver border, quiet and classic

items.name: Crimson Flame Card Back
items.description: Crimson card back with hand-painted flame motif framing a dark center panel.
items.flavor_text: The card burns. In pictures only. The opponent, in both.
items.art_prompt_hints: card back graphic, crimson field with hand-painted flame motif border, dark center panel, aggressive and warm

items.name: Arctic Ice Card Back
items.description: Pale-blue fractured ice pattern across the full card back, silver border accent.
items.flavor_text: Cold hands play cold games. The card back agrees, quietly.
items.art_prompt_hints: card back graphic, pale blue fractured ice pattern full spread, silver border accent, frigid and clean

items.name: Neon Grid Card Back
items.description: Dark card back with hot magenta neon grid receding toward a vanishing point.
items.flavor_text: A grid running off to somewhere else. The pilot goes wherever the grid goes.
items.art_prompt_hints: card back graphic, dark field with hot magenta neon grid receding to vanishing point, retro-synthwave mood

items.name: Obsidian Mirror Card Back
items.description: Volcanic obsidian card back with subtle reflective sheen across the center panel.
items.flavor_text: Hold the card up. The opponent is already looking back at you.
items.art_prompt_hints: card back graphic, volcanic obsidian field with subtle reflective sheen, centered panel, mysterious mirror-like

items.name: Voidexa Emblem Card Back
items.description: Official voidexa emblem centered on a deep-black card back. House colors only.
items.flavor_text: The emblem is a promise. The card back is the reminder. Play well.
items.art_prompt_hints: card back graphic, centered voidexa emblem on deep black field, teal and white house colors, official clean

items.name: Circuit Pattern Card Back
items.description: Green PCB substrate with fine copper trace-lines forming a geometric card-back pattern.
items.flavor_text: Etched like the card is carrying its own small decision engine. Maybe it is.
items.art_prompt_hints: card back graphic, green PCB substrate with copper trace lines forming geometric card pattern, technical and precise

items.name: Nebula Swirl Card Back
items.description: Purple and teal nebula swirl radiating from the card center outward. Soft edge glow.
items.flavor_text: Nebulae in miniature, pressed between the fingers. Cold, deep, portable.
items.art_prompt_hints: card back graphic, purple and teal nebula swirl radiating from center, soft edge glow, cosmic and dreamy

items.name: Ancient Runes Card Back
items.description: Parchment-brown card back with etched alien-glyph runes arranged in a geometric border.
items.flavor_text: The runes mean nothing anyone remembers. The card plays the same anyway.
items.art_prompt_hints: card back graphic, parchment brown with etched alien glyph runes in geometric border, archaeological mysterious

items.name: Holographic Card Back
items.description: Foil-holographic card back that shifts through cool spectrum as it tilts in the hand.
items.flavor_text: A card that picks its own color. The opponent never sees it twice.
items.art_prompt_hints: card back graphic, holographic foil effect shifting cool spectrum with tilt, collector-foil aesthetic, premium

items.name: Constellation Map Card Back
items.description: Inked constellation diagram with linked star points and labeled border coordinates.
items.flavor_text: A map drawn by someone who kept looking up. The deck caught on.
items.art_prompt_hints: card back graphic, inked constellation diagram with linked star points and coordinate border, scholarly cartographic

items.name: Hex Grid Card Back
items.description: Precise hexagonal grid in white-on-dark with a thin glow along select cell edges.
items.flavor_text: Pattern the eye wants to keep counting. The hand keeps playing anyway.
items.art_prompt_hints: card back graphic, precise hexagonal grid white on dark with glow along select cell edges, tactical modern

items.name: Plasma Core Card Back
items.description: Dark card back with a pulsing magenta plasma core at center, soft emissive halo.
items.flavor_text: Something burning in the middle of the card. Nobody lets it rest long.
items.art_prompt_hints: card back graphic, dark field with pulsing magenta plasma core at center, soft emissive halo, electric premium

items.name: Glitch Matrix Card Back
items.description: Corrupted-signal card back with scrolling scanline bands and periodic RGB glitch shift.
items.flavor_text: The signal broke during printing. They kept the misprint. People pay more.
items.art_prompt_hints: card back graphic, corrupted signal with scrolling scanline bands and RGB glitch shift, digital distressed mood

items.name: Galaxy Spiral Card Back
items.description: Top-down spiral galaxy with dust lanes and bright core, rendered in cool-hue wash.
items.flavor_text: Hold a galaxy in one hand. Play it into the discard pile. Play it again.
items.art_prompt_hints: card back graphic, top-down spiral galaxy with dust lanes and bright core, cool hue wash, cosmic scale

items.name: Aurora Folded Card Back
items.description: Aurora-ribbon card back with folded green-violet bands that appear to shift on tilt.
items.flavor_text: A card folded from sky the night it misbehaved. Nobody signed off.
items.art_prompt_hints: card back graphic, aurora ribbon folds green violet band shifting on tilt, sky-phenomenon foil, rare and elegant

items.name: Celestial Compass Card Back
items.description: Brass-etched celestial compass diagram with slow-rotating outer ring animation during play.
items.flavor_text: The compass always points at the next card. The pilot learned to listen.
items.art_prompt_hints: card back graphic, brass etched celestial compass with slow rotating outer ring, scholarly animated, rare

items.name: Ion Tide Card Back
items.description: Rippling ion-tide pattern in cool cyan with slow wave motion moving across the card face.
items.flavor_text: Waves that never reach shore. The card remembers the shore anyway.
items.art_prompt_hints: card back graphic, rippling ion tide cool cyan with slow wave motion, liquid premium, rare

items.name: Meridian Lattice Card Back
items.description: Interwoven meridian lines in gold-on-navy with intersection points lit from within.
items.flavor_text: Lines that knew each other before the card did. Somewhere they meet again.
items.art_prompt_hints: card back graphic, interwoven meridian lines gold on navy with intersection points lit from within, cartographic premium

items.name: Phase Glass Card Back
items.description: Phase-glass pattern showing two ghosted card-back layers drifting slowly against each other.
items.flavor_text: The card exists in two drafts. The opponent always picks the wrong one.
items.art_prompt_hints: card back graphic, two ghosted layers drifting slowly against each other, phase glass transparency, epic animated

items.name: Chronomatter Swirl Card Back
items.description: Slow clockwise chronomatter swirl with gold particulate drifting along the spiral arms.
items.flavor_text: The pattern takes its time. It always arrives exactly when the card is played.
items.art_prompt_hints: card back graphic, slow clockwise chronomatter spiral with gold particulate drifting along arms, time-dilation visual, epic

items.name: Voidrunner Sigil Card Back
items.description: Signature Voidrunner sigil on deep black with animated reactor-halo pulse from the center outward.
items.flavor_text: Nine decks carry this sigil. Each pilot earned the seat. The card just confirms it.
items.art_prompt_hints: card back graphic, signature voidrunner sigil on deep black with animated reactor halo pulse from center, legendary prestige

items.name: Silver Chrome Frame
items.description: Brushed silver chrome card frame. Catches light cleanly at every rotation.
items.flavor_text: Silver for the deck that does not need to announce itself. Everyone still notices.
items.art_prompt_hints: card border frame, brushed silver chrome with clean light catch, simple bevel, clean and neutral

items.name: Gold Border Frame
items.description: Warm gold border with subtle inner bezel line and very light engraving at the corners.
items.flavor_text: The gold edge says something. The hand playing it rarely has to.
items.art_prompt_hints: card border frame, warm gold border with subtle inner bezel and corner engraving, traditional prestige

items.name: Minimalist Black Frame
items.description: Thin matte-black frame with no ornamentation. Lets the card art do the talking.
items.flavor_text: The frame says nothing. The card inside says everything. Balance.
items.art_prompt_hints: card border frame, thin matte black with zero ornamentation, minimalist gallery aesthetic, silent and modern

items.name: Copper Rivet Frame
items.description: Industrial copper-plate frame with visible rivets at the four corners and seams between plates.
items.flavor_text: Built by a machinist who took the hobby a little too seriously. Proud of it.
items.art_prompt_hints: card border frame, industrial copper plate with visible corner rivets and seam lines, utilitarian machinist mood

items.name: Onyx Flat Frame
items.description: Flat onyx stone frame with soft polished edges and very faint interior vein texture.
items.flavor_text: Stone cut thin enough to carry. The card is heavier than it looks.
items.art_prompt_hints: card border frame, flat onyx stone with polished edges and faint interior vein, geological and solid

items.name: Ivory Slim Frame
items.description: Slim ivory-cream frame with clean rolled edges. Complements pale and mid-tone card art.
items.flavor_text: Warm tone for a cold duel. Every small kindness is welcome.
items.art_prompt_hints: card border frame, slim ivory cream with rolled edges, warm clean museum-aesthetic, pale and gentle

items.name: Carbon Edge Frame
items.description: Woven carbon-fiber frame with clear lacquer finish and thin chromed outer bezel.
items.flavor_text: Lightweight enough for the hand, dark enough for the room. Neither complains.
items.art_prompt_hints: card border frame, woven carbon fiber under clear lacquer with thin chrome outer bezel, tech-refined dark

items.name: Neon Purple Frame
items.description: Bright neon-purple frame with soft outer glow and very thin inner black bevel.
items.flavor_text: The frame hums, politely. Nobody asked. Everyone notices anyway.
items.art_prompt_hints: card border frame, bright neon purple with soft outer glow and thin inner black bevel, vivid and arcade-modern

items.name: Glitch Frame
items.description: Corrupted-signal border with intermittent RGB shift and periodic scanline slip during play.
items.flavor_text: The frame glitches every other heartbeat. The card, strangely, does not.
items.art_prompt_hints: card border frame, corrupted signal border with intermittent RGB shift and scanline slip, digital broken aesthetic

items.name: Scanline Frame
items.description: Dark frame with horizontal green scanlines slowly drifting vertically along the border.
items.flavor_text: The frame is a monitor pretending to be a border. Older crews can tell.
items.art_prompt_hints: card border frame, dark with horizontal green scanlines drifting vertically, CRT monitor nostalgia

items.name: Neon Green Edge Frame
items.description: Neon green outer edge with a thin black inner bezel and subtle corner notch detail.
items.flavor_text: Green seen late at night in a quiet room. The room usually gets loud after.
items.art_prompt_hints: card border frame, neon green outer edge with thin inner bezel and corner notch, arcade-tuner aesthetic

items.name: Chrome Chisel Frame
items.description: Chiseled chrome frame with sharp beveled facets and deep corner cut detail. Catches harsh light.
items.flavor_text: The frame has corners a pilot respects. Sharp opinions, sharper edges.
items.art_prompt_hints: card border frame, chiseled chrome with sharp beveled facets and deep corner cuts, architectural severe polish

items.name: Ancient Gold Frame
items.description: Weathered gold frame with etched alien glyphs along the inner bezel and patina in the corners.
items.flavor_text: Gold older than voidexa. The glyphs have stopped meaning anything the decks recognize.
items.art_prompt_hints: card border frame, weathered gold with etched alien glyphs inner bezel and corner patina, archaeological rare

items.name: Obsidian Edge Frame
items.description: Volcanic obsidian frame with sharp-fractured outer edge and deep lacquer inner rail.
items.flavor_text: Edge sharp enough to matter. Not sharp enough to cut the wrong hand.
items.art_prompt_hints: card border frame, volcanic obsidian with fractured outer edge and deep lacquer inner rail, dangerous sleek

items.name: Holographic Frame
items.description: Holographic foil frame that shifts through full spectrum on tilt. Inner bezel stays neutral white.
items.flavor_text: The frame picks a color, then changes its mind. The card does not.
items.art_prompt_hints: card border frame, holographic foil full-spectrum shift on tilt with neutral inner bezel, collector-foil rare

items.name: Crystal Cut Frame
items.description: Faceted crystal frame with interior refraction and faint glints shifting along the facets as the card moves.
items.flavor_text: The frame was grown, not machined. Pays off when the lights come on.
items.art_prompt_hints: card border frame, faceted crystal with interior refraction and shifting glints across facets, gemstone epic

items.name: Prismatic Engraved Frame
items.description: Chromed frame with fine prismatic engraving along every rail. Catches light into small rainbow flares.
items.flavor_text: Engravers argued for a month. The frame reflects the argument every time it lands.
items.art_prompt_hints: card border frame, chromed rails with fine prismatic engraving throwing small rainbow flares, artisan epic detailing

items.name: Ancient Relic Sigil Frame
items.description: Relic-bronze frame with glyphs that slowly rearrange along the inner bezel while the card is in play.
items.flavor_text: The glyphs choose the card they frame. The pilot never argues with the glyphs.
items.art_prompt_hints: card border frame, relic bronze with slowly rearranging alien glyphs along inner bezel, animated legendary mystic
